Survey-trained data scientist with NLP, LLM, and research-system experience.

I combine survey methodology, machine learning, NLP, and computational social science. My strongest work includes FrameScope, a live LLM-assisted AI discourse dashboard; ASHA survey response-rate analysis; EV sentiment analysis presented at AAPOR; GTI/media-framing research presented at IISA; and multistage sampling designs for applied survey problems.
